name: Bruno Garcia
cooked:
Nice dashboard, thanks for working on it!

I think a good metric to have on ASmap Dashboard (diff) is to track which ASNs was drastically moved. I mean, many moves are just big companies (Google, Amazon, etc) rearranging “internally”. Is there a way to track “weird” moves?
topic_title: ASmap dashboard: tracking the asmap-data history against the observed network
topic_html_title: ASmap dashboard: tracking the asmap-data history against the observed network
raw:
Nice dashboard, thanks for working on it! 

I think a good metric to have on https://jorisstrakeljahn.github.io/asmap-dashboard/#diff (diff) is to track which ASNs was drastically moved. I mean, many moves are just big companies (Google, Amazon, etc) rearranging "internally". Is there a way to track "weird" moves?
